description: Language-neutral conformance vectors for interpreting a GET {base}/health probe result. The probe has a short timeout (see docs/discovery-auth.md; default 2000ms). Input is the abstract observation of the probe (so the logic is testable without real network IO): 'status' (HTTP status, omitted on timeout/network failure), 'body' (parsed JSON body when available), and 'timedOut'/'networkError' flags. Output 'outcome' is one of: 'ok' (HTTP 200 AND body.status === 'ok'), 'unhealthy' (responded but not 200, or 200 without status:ok), 'timeout' (probe exceeded the deadline), 'unreachable' (connection refused / network error).
